data.body: STATUS (handoff): IMPLEMENTED + COMMITTED as stack commit a23963ca3 on branch worktree-foliaged-merry-collie (worktree .claude/worktrees/foliaged-merry-collie). Plan-review PASS+signed; pre-commit lint+full-mypy PASSED; tests/unit/test_g5_decomp_det.py (13) + 145 existing plan-review/kernel tests green. NOT CLOSED: close is deferred until this change's Gerrit Verified vote is +1 (CLAUDE.local.md CI-before-close rule). Next: push stack to gerrit, then transition in_progress->closed (runs completion-verifier) after Verified.
